feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sync Old profile to new profile
entry.content:
Hi,

Question for you:

I finally had my Universal ID reset correctly and can now access the Community Area.

I Noticed by new User Profile is empty, but did find my old user profile still populated with my blogs and answers.

What are the steps for me to get this profile synced with the new platform profile?? 

Pre-Migration Profile: former_member7310

 

 

New profile: Bobby_Byrne

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - test scripts upload
entry.content:
I'm looking for a way to upload a few Master data test scripts from the link here to Cloud ALM.

Is there a way for us to upload PDF formatted test scripts to Cloud ALM?

entry.title: Clicking on 'Comment' button with empty text field gives strange result
entry.content:
Because the inital comment field is inadequate, I tried clicking on the 'Comment' button, before entering any text. Just to see if I would be presented with the full editor.

Alas, (part of?) the page just reloaded, and only when I opened the Replies panel (it had closed), was I greeted with this:

entry.title: Adding a comment does "An Unexpected Error has occurred" since Saturday February 10th 2024.
entry.content: I guess it's a temporary error. I'm trying to comment an answer at Huge table entries in loop - SAP Community

entry.title: How can I see the latest published blogs?
entry.content:
Hi

Is there a way to see recently published blogs in the new community site? I have been missing all the latest blogs. Really dissapointed that this option is not available by default. 

p.s.- Not looking to see the 'most recent' blogs

Please let me know if someone has found a work-around. 

Thanks

Sandip

entry.title: Warehouse Stock is still showing even after GR reversal
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have done invoice and GR reversal but system is still showing warehouse stock. Please advice what could be the possible reason.

Unrestricted Warehouse stock is showing in MB52.

Note: I have replicated the scenario in QAS but when we reverse the GR it is not showed under warehouse stock as a standard behavior. But facing this issue in PRD server.

Awaiting Replies...!

Thanks in advance

entry.title: is it possible to get a null samlresponse page from sac(sp) server?
entry.content:
hi.
I am currently testing linking a web page composed of sac (sap analytics cloud) and a java server.
There is a part in sac where you can Verify Your Account.
I succeeded in receiving the samlrequest parameter set in the login URL from the IDP, creating a samlresponse, and sending it to acsurl.
The page code sent from sac in response to httppost is as follows.

I can't see any error logs. What should I do?

 

 

This is the samlrequest I received,

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<saml2p:AuthnRequest AssertionConsumerServiceURL="https://fisco.authentication.jp10.hana.ondemand.com/saml/SSO/alias/fisco.cf-jp10" Destination="https://saml.sogang.ac.kr:8443/sso/getSamlRedirect" ForceAuthn="false" ID="a145eb3f7hc5f4ba559ad6edf02g760" IsPassive="false" IssueInstant="2024-02-14T01:11:20.759Z" ProtocolBinding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:HTTP-POST" Version="2.0" xmlns:saml2p="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:protocol"><saml2:Issuer xmlns:saml2="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:assertion">https://fisco.authentication.jp10.hana.ondemand.com</saml2:Issuer><saml2p:NameIDPolicy Format="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:unspecified"/></saml2p:AuthnRequest>
This is the samlresponse I sent.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><saml2p:Response xmlns:saml2p="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:protocol" Destination="https://fisco.authentication.jp10.hana.ondemand.com/saml/SSO/alias/fisco.cf-jp10" ID="_c3419567d104d821d798a1300fc05977" InResponseTo="a145eb3f7hc5f4ba559ad6edf02g760" IssueInstant="2024-02-14T01:12:26.872Z" Version="2.0"><saml2:Issuer xmlns:saml2="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:assertion">https://saml.sogang.ac.kr:8443</saml2:Issuer><saml2p:Status><saml2p:StatusCode Value="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:status:Success"/></saml2p:Status><saml2:Assertion xmlns:saml2="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:assertion" ID="_dbe69fc354fac6076d0b2423223e7c79" IssueInstant="2024-02-14T01:12:26.869Z" Version="2.0"><saml2:Issuer>https://saml.sogang.ac.kr:8443</saml2:Issuer><saml2:Subject><saml2:NameID Format="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:unspecified">HKIM</saml2:NameID></saml2:Subject></saml2:Assertion></saml2p:Response>

I don't get any errors on my server side (IDP). I set up a redirect and sent an httppost, but the response body only contains an empty HTML form shell, and I can't find out anything.
Can you tell me why the redirect doesn't work?

entry.title: Can't edit my blog post after publishing
entry.content:
Hi,

I created the blog post

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-datasphere-enable-sap-hana-development-infrastructure-hdi/ba-p/13602509

I now want to add one sentence I forgot. I don't get option to edit now this blog . It was there before Migration.

I'm not able to update my blog post. Can you please fix this?

Thanks

Gopi

entry.title: Answer does not become visible, even after page refresh
entry.content:
I came accross the following weird and unnecessary system behavior in Q&A:

  1. Post an answer to a question. (At the top of the page a link appears that redirects to the same question, but now showing the answer you just posted.)
  2. Forget to look at the top of the page or do not understand the text that appeared at the top of the page.
  3. Look at the bottom of the page, where the answers should be. (Spoiler: The answer you just posted has not appeared there.)
  4. Refresh the page with CTRL+F5 or CTRL+R (Spoiler: The answer you just posted still does not appear.)
  5. Do not understand, and post the answer again.
  6. Go to step 1 to repeat the mistake or to the next step to experience the effect of your actions.
  7. Use the link that appeared at the top of the page. The page gets reloaded.
  8. Scroll to the bottom of the page, and depending on how many times you repeated steps 1 through 6, you will see you answer has appeared an equal amount of times.

Please note that comments are posted right away. No need to reload the page using the provided link.

Secondary problem: you cannot delete your answer or comment. You can however empty it out.

entry.title: Is sapqualtricsaddon needed to use Qualtrics with SAP Commerce 2205 and Spartacus 4.3?
entry.content:
Environment:
- SAP Commerce 2205
- Spartacus 4.3

Is sapqualtricsaddon needed to use Qualtrics with SAP Commerce 1905 and Spartacus 4.3? The Spartacus Qualtric guide - https://sap.github.io/spartacus-docs/qualtrics-integration/ - doesn't explicitly mention it. It has a link to "SAP Qualtrics Integration Module", but it's not pointing specifically to Qualtrics.

Do I need to install sapqualtricsaddon, as mentioned in SAP Qualtrics Integration (for SAP Commerce 2211) for Qualtrics to work with Spartacus? See: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_INTEGRATIONS/598708c40590492290efb66921a13f16/66fb06cc3abc4a71bab667ab51685a26.html

entry.title: When single sign on to SAC, can I know the xml form of the samlresponse required to log in to SAC?
entry.content: When single sign on to SAC, can I know the xml form of the samlresponse required to log in to SAC?

entry.title: Mapping User Group to Roles Collection in BTP
entry.content:
Hii,

i have already assign user group to role collection but when i trying to login into Application then it saying Access Denied. how to resolve it?

entry.title: New Special GL Indicator
entry.content:
Dear Community/Experts,

In Our current project, we have some Employee Advances/ loans  Given to Employees/Staff members that need to be captured as Down payments to Employees in seperate GLs and many similar Advances for which they need to have a seperate Special GL indicator.

Would you please guide us on how can we achieve this Requirement

Thank you

entry.title: Product Cost Estimation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I run "material cost estimation" by using transaction code ck11n,
activity cost and activity IOH cost values not updating. Could please anyone help me. 

Regards,

Prabhakar

entry.title: [SAP DMC] - Call external service using POD View Extension with destination
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I need some guidance on a scenario where I have to call an external service using a POD View extension with a destination in BTP. Does anyone have an example or can guide me on how to do this?

Essentially, I need to call an endpoint in Cloud Integration. I attempted to follow the steps outlined in the Ajax Requests | SAP Help Portal, but I'm encountering difficulties.

Thanks

entry.title: Timeout for lost SAP 4hana internet connection
entry.content:
Hello !

We have a especific process that need to use data mobile for count material.

If exists any problems with wifi connection during process, we lost all operation realized.

Would we like to know if exists some setup in SAP 4Hana for increase this time out?

We already tried change some procedures like as rdisp/max_wprun_time and others in transaction RZ11, but not did effects.

 

Thanks so much.

entry.title: Re: How to use HANA Calculation View created in BW System...
entry.content: Ever since SAP migrated its community everything broke and now all the history of help is no longer available the link pointed above is broken. How can SAP miss such a critical thing ?

entry.title: SAP S4HANA Attachment Service Attribute handling
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I am trying to bind below parameters dynamically into the visible actions of attachment service. Somehow those parameters are not getting binded and whole string is getting passed as it 

Has anyone binded this dynamically anytime and is there something wrong in my code ?

 

thanks

entry.title: Missing key components during redefinition processs
entry.content:
Hi all,
I am trying to redefine the standard Odata service FDP_BD_STANDARD_CH_OP. During the process of redefinition I have noticed that the key fields are missing in the selection screen.

Here is one of the examples:

 

Why are the key fields not available during the redefinition process?

Best regards

entry.title: How to check the Disk usage of the PO Java system in the SAP NetWeaver Adminstrator interface
entry.content: As the title shows, I can see the usage of CPU and Memroy in the system summary of SAP NetWeaver Adminstrator, but I cannot see any information about Disk. If anyone knows, can you tell me? Thank you very much.
